fields.target_ids: normalized target ids touched by the event
fields.competency_ids: competency ids inferred for this exercise
fields.competency_tags: snapshot of competency id, dimension and label at event time
fields.direction: practice direction such as audio_to_russian or recognition
fields.importance: exercise or target importance at event time
fields.confidence: internal inferred confidence 1-5; null when the learner only deferred
fields.target_snapshots: snapshot of target ids, text, lesson, kind and weighting at event time
